def process_user_data(raw_data):
    # Violation: duplicate transformation pipeline logic repeated
    clean_name = raw_data["name"].strip().lower().replace("_", " ")
    return {"name": clean_name}

def process_admin_data(raw_data):
    clean_name = raw_data["full_name"].strip().lower().replace("_", " ")
    return {"admin_name": clean_name}
